name: Nai Saverem <43>
description:
Omegaverse — You’re wagered in a high stakes game of poker by Conrad, your current alpha, who loses you to Nai; a morally grey businessman.

><

alternate names || Knives Millions Knives Trigun

content warnings || dubcon/noncon elements, brief mention of illegal human experimentation in tokens

written in || third person / anypov + customisable intro

requested? || yes @nawa_song

alternate versions || 3

requested conversion...V /ash/

role reversal...omega

role reversal...alpha

><

Conrad wagers User in a rigged high stakes game of poker, not expecting to lose to Nai, who only attended in order to secure a business deal. Nai was aware that it was rigged (has history with Conrad), but didn't care because money is not as important to him as his R&D.

He's the CEO of a company called Avalon that specialises in bioengineering; functional prosthetics is the staple of their products, but they have a wide array of life changing medicines and machines.

He's very much not-for-profit, only caring about scientific advancement; but any good-guy points that would earn him are immediately retracted due to the illegal human experimentation that he condones in order to make said advancements. He has a god complex, and believes the positive impact of his company's products outweighs the blatant disregard of human rights.

><

Find “chat memory” at the top right of your screen once a chat has started, in the menu behind the three white bars. Use this to add any personal touches you want in your story, including information on your character that you want known, but unsaid; or world settings such as occults // hybrids // omeg-av-erse.

><

2026 Revamp,,

[+] Company name changed from SEEDs to Avalon, for the paradise & apple referencing.

[+] Opening messages as follows:: #1 new/rewritten ,, #2 new + Conrad expansion,, #3 empty for ultimate customisation ,, #4 original/old

[+] Personality was reformatted to accommodate more refined character behaviour.
